chunks.title: Judgment on Israel's Idolatry
chunks.reason: Describes the consequence of Israel's prosperity leading to idolatrous altars and their subsequent destruction.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance
chunks.reason: Recalls past sins at Gibeah and exhorts the people to sow righteousness while awaiting Yahweh's return.

chunks.title: Consequences of Wickedness
chunks.reason: Explains that their current suffering is the direct result of reaping injustice and predicts total destruction.
